raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch nehnie tahs no
innu Rohkas / un noſihmeja to
weenu Rafstamo / un lehje no
weenu Teltu / tad fazzija tee:
chee irr tawi Deewi / Ysraelis /
tew no Egiptes-Semmes irr
vedduschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad to Aarons redſeja/ tad
taitija wiꞥſch preeſch ta twee-
Altari/ un Aarons iſfauze un
tja : Rihta irr ta KUNGA
vehtki.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee zehlahs ohtrâ Deenâ
i/un uppureja Dedsamus-Up-
us / un afneffe Pateifschanas-
urus / un tee Laudis apſeh-
s ehſt un dsert / un zehlahs
ſcham meeslotees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tas KUNGS
Mohsu : Eij / kaſp femmê/ jo
i Laudis / fo tu no Egiptes-
mnes effi iſweddig / irr fa-
taischees:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee irr drihsatlakypufschi no
Belta / fo es teem biju paweh-
tee irr few weenu Teltu feh-
hi/ un irr preeſch ta peeluhgu-
/ un irr tam uppurejschi/ un
ifschi : fchee irr tawi Deewi /
aels / kas tew irr iſweddnschi
Egiptes-Semmes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wehl fazzija tas KUNGS
Mohsu : es eſmu fchohs Lau-
eerandsijs / un redſi / tee irr
rgalwigi Laudis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un un laid mannis / ka
nna Dusniba prett teem ap-
stahs/ un tohs aprihj/ tad dar-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Mohsus peeluhdfe ta
KUNGA fawa Deewa Waigu/
un fazzija: At KUNGS! kapehz
apſkaitifees tawa Dusniba pahr
taweem Laudiin / fo tu no Egip-
tes-Semmes effi iſweddig/ ar lee-
iu Spehku / un ar weenu ſtipru
Rohkn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kapehz buhs teen Egipte-
reem runnaht / un fazzijt : us
Melaim irr wiꞥſch tehſ iſweddig/
ka wiꞥſch tohs nokantu Kalnôs /
un iſdeldetu no Semmes Wirſur
atgreeſees no tawas Dusnibas
Karstuma / un lai tew ſchehſ nah-
kahs tawu Lauschu Laundarris-
chanas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Peeminini to Abbrâänni/
Ihsaäku un Ysraëlu tawus Kal-
pus/ kam tu peeſew paſcha ſweh-
rejs effi : un us teem runnajs/es
wairoschu juhſit Dsimnumu/ ka
tahs Debbes Swaigsnes/ un fcho
wiſhu Semni/ no ka esrunnajs
eſimu / dohſchu es juhſam Dsim-
mumam par ihpaſchu Semini
muhscham.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad bija tam KUNGAM
ſchehl tas Caunums/no ka wiꞥſch
bij runnajs/ka wiꞥſch to ſaveem
Laudim darritu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Mohsus atgreeſahs/ un
nokahpe no Kalna ar teem diwi
Leezibas Galdeem fawâ Rohkâ/
tee Galdi bija jawâs abbejâs Puſ-
tês aprakſiti / tee bija us fcho un
us winnu Puſſi aprakſiti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee paſchi Galdi bija
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
